title: Oil Gains Amid Increasingly Bullish Fundamentals
section_path: Oil Gains Amid Increasingly Bullish Fundamentals
section_path_text: Oil Gains Amid Increasingly Bullish Fundamentals
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Weak economic data and warnings that growth will continue to slow due to tighter monetary policies saw sentiment suffer across commodity markets. A stronger USD also weighed on investor appetite. Crude oil prices pushed higher to end the session at the highest level since March amid strong fundamentals.
